control_families.name: Access Control
control_families.description: Policies and procedures controlling system access, account management, and least privilege enforcement.

control_families.name: Awareness & Training
control_families.description: Security awareness and role-based training programs for all personnel.

control_families.name: Audit & Accountability
control_families.description: Event logging, log review, protection of audit information, and audit report generation.

control_families.name: Assessment, Authorization & Monitoring
control_families.description: Security assessments, authorization decisions, continuous monitoring, and plan of action items.

control_families.name: Configuration Management
control_families.description: Baseline configurations, change control, least functionality, and configuration settings enforcement.

control_families.name: Contingency Planning
control_families.description: Business continuity, disaster recovery, backup procedures, and reconstitution capabilities.

control_families.name: Identification & Authentication
control_families.description: User identification, multi-factor authentication, authenticator management and password policies.

control_families.name: Incident Response
control_families.description: Incident response plan, reporting, handling procedures, and testing.

control_families.name: Maintenance
control_families.description: System maintenance policies, controlled maintenance tools, and remote maintenance controls.

control_families.name: Media Protection
control_families.description: Media access, marking, storage, transport, sanitization, and disposal controls.

control_families.name: Physical & Environmental Protection
control_families.description: Physical access controls, environmental monitoring, visitor access records, and power equipment.

control_families.name: Planning
control_families.description: Security and privacy plans, rules of behavior, and system security plan maintenance.

control_families.name: Personnel Security
control_families.description: Personnel screening, termination, transfer, access agreements, and third-party personnel security.

control_families.name: Risk Assessment
control_families.description: Risk assessments, vulnerability scanning, privacy risk assessments, and criticality analysis.

control_families.name: System & Services Acquisition
control_families.description: Secure development lifecycle, supply chain risk management, developer security testing.

control_families.name: System & Communications Protection
control_families.description: Boundary protection, cryptographic key management, secure communications, and network segmentation.

control_families.name: System & Information Integrity
control_families.description: Malware protection, security alerts, software integrity, spam protection, and error handling.

control_families.name: Supply Chain Risk Management
control_families.description: Supply chain risk management plan, provenance, inspection and acceptance of system components.
